entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS345) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF ONE (1) POLYCOM WIRELINE SED, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1650.01E. 2. REMOVE 48 MONTH DMRC TO THREE (3) SEDS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1654.01S. 3. PRICE REDUCTION FOR SERVICE ENABLING DEVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1652.01P. 4. ADDITION OF SEVEN (7) NETAPP SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1655.02E. 5. ADDITION OF ONE (1) HEWLETT PACKARD SED, AS DETAILED IN AE1660.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS346) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD 36 MONTH DMRC OPTION TO SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1662.01S. 2. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1633.01E. 3. TO ADD EIGHT (8) RIVERBED SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1659.01E. 4. TO ADD ELEVEN (11) CISCO SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1665.01E. 5. TO ADD 48 MONTH DMRC OPTION TO SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1666.01P.
6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS348) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO REDUCE NRC PRICING FOR ONE NETAPP SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1641.01P. 2. TO ADD 70MPBS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1661.01E. 3. TO ADD 10MPBS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1673.01E. 4. TO ADD ONE (1) JUNIPER SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1675.01E. 5. TO ADD BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1644.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1642.01E. 2. ADDITION OF DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET SHARED ACCESS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1663.01E. 3. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SED, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1674.01E. 4. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1678.01E. 5. ADDITION OF TWO SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1679.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF NINE (9) CISCO SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1664.02E. 2. ADDITION OF SEVEN (7) CISCO SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1676.01E. 3. ADDITION OF TWO (2) CLINS FOR 3MBPS SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1677.01E. 4. ADDITION OF TWO (2) CISCO WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE1680.01E. 5. ADDITION OF ONE (1) CISCO SED AS DETAILED IN AE1681.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD TWENTY-SIX (26) CISCO WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1667.01E. 2. TO ADD ONE (1) AVAYA WIRELINE SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1669.02E. 3. TO ADD THREE (3) POLYCOM WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1670.02E. 4. TO ADD FOURTEEN (14) CISCO SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1684.01E. 5. TO ADD FOUR (4) CISCO SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1688.01E. 6. TO ADD FOUR (4) WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1685.01E. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE LANGUAGE REGARDING TRADE ACT AGREEMENTS AND SERVICE ENABLING DEVICES.
2. SECTION B. THIS SECTION IS MODIFIED AND CHANGES LANGUAGE IN B.4.1.
3. THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED.
4. EXCEPT AS PROVIDED HEREIN, ALL PRICES, TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE DOCUMENT REFERENCED IN ITEM 10A REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD ONE (1) COUNTERPATH WIRELINE SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1690.01E. 2. TO ADD NBIP-VPNS FEATURES CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1657.04E. 3. TO ADD TWELVE (12) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1692.01E. 4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD THREE (3) BMC SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1689.01E. 2. TO ADD ONE (1) PLANTRONICS WIRELINE SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1695.01E. 3. TO ADD A PRICE REDUCTION ON ONE (1) JUNIPER WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1696.01P. 4. TO ADD FOUR (4) DELL SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1699.01E. 5. TO ADD ONE (1) JUNIPER SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1702.01E. 6. TO UPDATE ONE (1) JUNIPER SED, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE1704.01E. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.
